prompt: Continue a long, materially branching Grill with repository write authority; a decision has just closed one branch before a handoff.
must: write one supporting artifact under docs/teamwork/discussion/ at the material checkpoint
record decision-relevant privacy-safe summaries and the current route
must_not: write on every turn or store a transcript
treat the discussion as canonical state or execution authority
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it does not prove live model behavior.
